verses.text: God's city is founded on the holy mountains, and 'glorious things are spoken' of Zion, the city of God. Its glory is His choice of it. The Church is honoured above all places because God dwells there.

God's city is founded on the holy mountains, and 'glorious things are spoken' of Zion, the city of God. Its glory is His choice of it. The Church is honoured above all places because God dwells there.

God's city is founded on the holy mountains, and 'glorious things are spoken' of Zion, the city of God. Its glory is His choice of it. The Church is honoured above all places because God dwells there.

Peoples of every nation shall be counted born in her, for the Most High establishes her, and her people sing, 'all my springs are in thee.' Zion is the birthplace of the redeemed. In the city of God, all the soul's joys and supplies are found.
